description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses node:alpine as the default Docker image and defines two stages, test and build, while also including the SAST and Dependency-Scanning templates. Define a hidden .Test job that runs `npm ci` in a before_script and belongs to the test stage, and a hidden .build_tarball job that runs `npm ci` in a before_script, uses the node:latest image, executes `bash stages.sh tarball "vikserver-${VIKSERVER_COMMIT_NAME}.tar"` in its script, and stores the resulting `vikserver-${VIKSERVER_COMMIT_NAME}.tar` as an artifact. Add a Build current tarball job that extends .build_tarball, sets the variable VIKSERVER_COMMIT_NAME to `${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}`, runs in the build stage, and is excluded from tag pipelines (`except: tags`). Add a Build tagged tarball job that also extends .build_tarball, sets VIKSERVER_COMMIT_NAME to `${CI_COMMIT_TAG}`, runs in the build stage, and runs only on tag pipelines (`only: tags`). Finally, add a Test CSS job extending .Test that runs `npm run stylelint` in the test stage, and a Test JS job extending .Test that runs `npm test` followed by `npm run eslint` in the test stage.
